title: CommandTowers
description: Useful buttons inside command block UI
body:
# CommandTowers
* Adds buttons to the Command Block UI to speed up building and command management.
* Compatible with [Better Command Block UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettercommandblockui).

### Buttons:
* **Add** – Moves all blocks above and places a Chain Command Block.
* **Copy** – Moves blocks above and places a Chain Command Block with the same command.
* **Remove** – Moves blocks above down.
* **Predict** – Like Copy, but automatically adjusts number values based on patterns found in previous commands.
